summary: The first real-runtime adapter tranche for gix and sem is complete. Both backends are integrated, validated as projection-only runtime surfaces, and closed for this proposal slice.
closed_scope: unified runner aggregation across gix and sem
normalized manifest/report reuse for the git substrate lane
remaining_follow_on: migrate the highest-priority shell and Python entrypoints from the recorded port inventories
decide whether additional hardening should become a new proposal slice instead of extending this tranche
notes: Closeout applies to the adapter integration tranche only.
This does not promote gix or sem outputs to authority.
This does not imply repo-wide script cutover.
